specific_question: How much faster did trained salespeople at Elexion Automotive close deals than their peers who weren't formally trained by the company?
answer: A November 2024 analysis showed that sales representatives who completed advanced product training provided by the company closed deals 28% faster than their untrained peers.
dr_question: If Elexion Automotive shifts from dealership franchising to a direct-to-customer sales model, how could it capture the benefits of the transition to drive sales and higher margins in 2027?
